sections.sectionTitle: Job in Pasian' Vangliatna leh Pasian' Pilna Gen

verses.text: Tua ciangin Job in dawng a
“Note pen theihna kicing na kisa mah uh a, pilna a nei na kisa mah uh hi
Ahi zongin note zah mahin kei zong thu ka thei a, midangte sangin na theihzawk uh bang om tuan ahi hiam
Ka lawmte nangawn in tu-in kei hong nuihsan uh a, kei dikin paubaanglo napi hong nuihsan uh hi. Ahi zongin Pasian in ka thungetna a hong piak hun om hi
Note in lungkhamna bangmah na nei kei uh a, kei na hong ciamnuih bawl gawpgawp uh hi. A puk dektak mipa na satgawp uh hi
Guta mite nuamtakin om hithiat uh a, Pasian a simmawhte nuamtakin nungta uh hi
“Ahi zongin gamsate va dong un, hong hilh ding uh hi. Vasate va dong un, hong hilh ding uh hi
Leitung ganhingte va dong un, hong hilh ding uh hi. Tui sung ngasate zong va dong un, hong hilh ding uh hi
Pasian' khut in amaute a bawlna thu a vekpi-un thei kim uh hilo ahi hiam
A pian'saksate' nuntakna Pasian mah in a uk ahi hi. Mihing khempeuhte' nuntakna ama khutsungah om hi
Leii in an a ciap mah bangin, bil in ngai thei hilo ahi hiam
“Khanghamte in pilna nei a, nuntak saute in thu theitel uh hi
Pasian in pilna leh vang nei a, amah thukipin thu a theitel hi
Pasian in phelkek leh kuamah in lamkik zolo a, Pasian in thongah mi koih leh kuamah in suaktasak zolo hi
Pasian in guah khaktan leh leitung keugaw a, tui a khah ciangin tui hong khang hi
“Pasian thahatin gualzo tawntung a, mi khemte leh khemna a thuakte Pasian' ukna nuai-ah a om uh ahi hi
Amah in mipilte' pilna susia-in, makaite pen mihai bangin gamtasak hi
Amah in kumpite zakiasak a, thongah a khia hi
Siampite mihai suaksak a, mi vangliante lawnthal hi
Amah in mi' muan'te a pau theiloin bawl a, khanghamte' pilna a paihkhiatsak hi
Amah in mi vangliante mindaisak a, mi thupite' kihihsakna a beisak hi
Amah in khuamial sung panin thuthukte kalkhia a, a kithei zolo thute kitelsak hi
Amah in minamte thahatsakin liansak a, ahi zongin amah in tuate zogawpin susia hi
Amah in minam makaite a pilna uh paihkhiatsak a, lampi omlohna gamlakah vakvaisak hi
Khuamial lakah amaute in mialzawt uh a, zukham bangin amaute hoihoi uh hi.
